text.message: Lol I need sheep and ore

it was the second you threw black

You placed the robber on 6 wheat
early game the blocking the 10 ore when they have a 4 ore is pointless
I'm on all the other good spots
ok so you just weren't paying attention lol

When blue was leading by a mile
but I blocked the 8 multiple times

you wanted sheep, that is a horrific trade to make

sorry red thought I was going to hand them sheep
